/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/benchmark_variant.dir/test/benchmark/benchmark_variant.cpp.o -o benchmark_variant  -Wl,-rpath,/root/ros2_ws/build/rcl_yaml_param_parser:/root/ros2_ws/install/libyaml_vendor/lib:/root/ros2_ws/install/rmw/lib:/root/ros2_ws/install/rosidl_runtime_c/lib:/opt/ros/humble/lib /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbenchmark_main.so.1.5.3 /opt/ros/humble/lib/libperformance_test_fixture.so librcl_yaml_param_parser.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbenchmark.so.1.5.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a /opt/ros/humble/lib/libmemory_tools.so /root/ros2_ws/install/libyaml_vendor/lib/libyaml.so /root/ros2_ws/install/rmw/lib/librmw.so /root/ros2_ws/install/rosidl_runtime_c/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
